title: Deleted Records
subtitle: Review soft-deleted records across the system, restore them when needed, or permanently remove them before the 30-day cleanup runs.

filters.search_placeholder: Search by title, id, or module

actions.restore_failed: Unable to restore the selected record.
actions.force_delete_failed: Unable to permanently delete the selected record.

restore_description: This will move {name} back to active records and may affect related data.
force_delete_description: This will permanently delete {name} and cannot be undone.
empty: No deleted records were found for the selected filters.
